title: session — declared entitlements
description: Five entitlement keys. `sports_sessions` is the boolean master gate. `session_slot` caps sessions per week per tenant. `session_private_lessons` gates the private_lesson session_type (Medium+). `session_coach_ratings` gates coach_rating_input + AggregateCoachRatingsJob (Medium+). `session_lesson_plans` gates lesson_plan_url + curriculum_topic beyond a small character limit (Enterprise).

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. All tiers get sessions — a sports academy without sessions is a directory, not a service. Tier limits apply via session_slot. Off = the whole module is invisible.
enforcedBy: SessionObserver.creating refuses when the gate is closed (SESSION_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI resource surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'sports_sessions.core'

entitlements.description: How many Sessions a tenant can have in one calendar week. Small: 20 (basic academy — ~4 team practices + a few private lessons per week). Medium: 200 (multi-branch tenant). Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on Session create; the accounting window is the ISO calendar week containing session.starts_at. Cancelled sessions still count against their week.
enforcedBy: SessionObserver.creating consumes 1 unit via EntitlementGate::consume('session_slot', { week: iso_week_of_starts_at })
SessionObserver.deleted (hard-delete only — post-retention) releases the slot

entitlements.description: Enables session_type='private_lesson' and 'group_lesson'. Medium + Enterprise. Small tenants can create practice / class / drop_in / workshop / trial / assessment / game / open_gym but not the coach-billed lesson types.
enforcedBy: SessionObserver.creating refuses when session_type IN ('private_lesson', 'group_lesson') AND gate is closed (SESSION_PRIVATE_LESSONS_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI create screen filters the session_type options

entitlements.description: Enables coach_rating_input on Session + the SessionRatingRequestNotification + AggregateSessionRatingsJob rating aggregation into Coach.rating (Wave 2b). Medium + Enterprise. Small tier gets sessions but no ratings.
enforcedBy: SessionObserver.creating/saving refuses coach_rating_input IS NOT NULL when gate closed (SESSION_COACH_RATINGS_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
AggregateSessionRatingsJob skips tenants without the gate
SDUI ratings surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'sports_sessions.coach_ratings'

entitlements.description: Enables lesson_plan_url column + curriculum_topic beyond 64 chars. Enterprise-only — full lesson-planning is a coaching-org feature.
enforcedBy: SessionObserver.creating/saving refuses lesson_plan_url IS NOT NULL when gate closed (SESSION_LESSON_PLANS_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SessionObserver.creating/saving refuses curriculum_topic > 64 chars when gate closed
SDUI create + edit screens hide the lesson plan fields when features array does not include 'sports_sessions.lesson_plans'
